title: An Act appropriating $6,300,000 from the Anti-Litter and Beautification Fund to the Virgin Islands Waste Management Authority and the Virgin Islands Department
text:
ACT NO.8 90 2
BILL NO. 35-0354
THIRTY-FIFTH LEGISLATURE OF THE VIRGIN ISLANDS
Regular Session
2024
An Act providing an appropriation from the Anti-Litter and Beautification Fund to the Virgin
Islands Waste Management Authority and the Virgin Islands Department ofPublic Works for
operating expenses during the fiscal year October 1, 2024, through September 30, 2025
---0---
Be it enacted by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands:
SECTION 1. The following sums, or so much thereof as may be necessary, are
appropriated from the Anti-Litter and Beautification Fund in the Treasury ofthe Government
of the Virgin Islands to the following departments for operating expenses for the fiscal year
October 1,2024, through September 30, 2025.
2043 ANTI-LITTER AND BEAUTIFICATION FUND FY 2025
610 DEPARTMENT OF PUBLIC WORKS
Department ofPublic Works $1,000,000
Abandoned Vehicles STX $ 75,000
—
Abandoned Vehicles STT $ 75,000
—
Abandoned Vehicles— STJ $ 75,000
Mitchell Motel Quarterly Cleanup STT $ 75,000
—
Total Department ofPublic Works $1,300,000
620 VIRGIN ISLANDS WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY
TOTAL VIRGIN ISLANDS WASTE MANAGEMENT AUTHORITY $5,000,000
TOTAL 2043 ANTI-LITTER AND BEAUTIFICATION FUND $6,300,000

2
Thus passed by the Legislature ofthe Virgin Islands on September 27, 2024.
Witness our Hands and Seal of the Legislature of the Virgin Islands this 3CGay of
September, A.D., 2024.
No lie E. Francis,
President
Carla J. Jose
Secretary
. AAA A
Bill No. 35-0354 is hereby approved.
Witness my hand and the Seal ofthe Government of
the United States Virgin Islands at Charlotte Amalie,
St. Thomas, This )t’day ofOctober, 2024 A.D.
Governor
